projectDescription: An Android inline hook library supporting Thumb, ARM32, and ARM64 instruction sets for production apps.
keyFeatures: Inline hook for entire functions (hook) and mid-function instruction intercept
Supports armeabi-v7a and arm64-v8a on Android 4.1–16 (API 16–36)
Three hook modes: shared (recursive-safe chaining), multi (chaining without recursion guard), and unique (exclusive hook)
Auto-hooks newly loaded ELFs via library name + function name with pending task support
Symbol lookup bypassing linker namespace restrictions (.dynsym, .symtab, .gnu_debugdata)
CFI and FP unwind compatibility in proxy and interceptor functions
Operation recording with exportable hook/intercept audit log
publicApiSurface: shadowhook_hook_sym_name(const char *lib_name, const char *sym_name, void *new_addr, void **orig_addr)
shadowhook_hook_sym_name_2(lib_name, sym_name, new_addr, orig_addr, uint32_t flags)
shadowhook_hook_sym_name_callback_2(lib_name, sym_name, new_addr, orig_addr, flags, hooked, hooked_arg)
shadowhook_intercept_instr_addr(void *instr_addr, shadowhook_interceptor_t pre, void *data, uint32_t flags, ...)
shadowhook_intercept_func_addr(void *func_addr, shadowhook_interceptor_t pre, void *data, uint32_t flags, ...)
shadowhook_intercept_sym_addr(void *sym_addr, shadowhook_interceptor_t pre, void *data, uint32_t flags, ...)
shadowhook_intercept_sym_name(lib_name, sym_name, pre, data, uint32_t flags)
shadowhook_intercept_sym_name_callback(lib_name, sym_name, pre, data, flags, intercepted, intercepted_arg)
